/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/tcmt-server.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tcmt-server.dir/src/server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tcmt-server.dir/src/device.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tcmt-server.dir/src/storage.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tcmt-server.dir/src/api.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tcmt-server.dir/src/ws.cpp.o" -o tcmt-server  libsqlite3.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.dylib
